name: masonry-grid
description: Pinterest-style masonry grid that balances items across columns by height.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of data items to lay out in the masonry grid.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Function that renders each grid item.

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in the grid.

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing token controlling the gap between items.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container.

props.name: keyExtractor
props.description: Function that returns a unique key for each item; defaults to index-based key.

props.name: getItemHeight
props.description: Optional height provider. When supplied, items are distributed on first render without a layout-measurement reflow.

props.name: testID
props.description: Test identifier forwarded as `{testID}-item-{index}` to each item wrapper.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<MasonryGrid
  data={photos}
  columns={2}
  gap="sm"
  keyExtractor={(item) => item.id}
  renderItem={(item) => (
    <Image source={{ uri: item.url }} style={{ height: item.height }} />
  )}
/>
